reviews.comment:
Buena atención, instalaciones impecables, pero las empleadas del servicompras no deberían discutir adelante de los clientes, muy desagradable presenciar su dicusión

(Translated by Google)
Good service, impeccable facilities, but the convenience store employees shouldn't argue in front of customers; it was very unpleasant to witness their argument.

reviews.comment:
Malisima la atención. Viaje mucho en estos 32 años de vida y sin dudas esta es la peor estación de servicio en la que pare. Le recomiendo la Full que está muy próxima aunque tengan q hacer fila. Perder algo de tiempo en otro puede ser igual a no ganar una mala experiencia.

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. I've traveled a lot in my 32 years, and without a doubt, this is the worst gas station I've ever stopped at. I recommend the Full station that's very close, even if you have to wait in line. Wasting a little time at another station could be the same as having a bad experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1OWFXS3FBRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) They don't serve Brazilians, and I was treated badly there.

Não atende brasileiros ,e fui mal tratado no local.

reviews.comment:
El full doble de caro que en el resto del país. A las 11 de la mañana ya no había nada x desayunar. Bien la limpieza

(Translated by Google)
The full package was twice as expensive as in the rest of the country. By 11 am there was nothing left for breakfast. The cleanliness was good.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención tanto los de plalla y ni desir la chica de anteojos que atiende a la mañana después de un largo viaje siendo las 7y30 no tenía medias lunas para desayunar

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service, both from the beach staff and especially from the girl with glasses who works in the morning. After a long trip, at 7:30 she didn't have any croissants for breakfast.
